title: Enterprise governance and provider-neutral delivery
acceptance: RBAC, segregation of duties, quorum, and immutable policy-decision receipts deny unauthorized state mutations.
A provider SPI preserves GitHub behavior and adds a generic Git delivery provider without domain-layer provider branching.
New delivery profile records are versioned and existing v1 profiles continue to work unchanged.
